level.instructions: In an overwhelming world, sometimes you have to completely invert your perspective just to process things in the right order. Take this train and reverse it. Hint: Use a loop to keep splitting the head off, and let the 'cons' cell catch them backward.
level.thoughts: Teaches the user how to combine head_split and cons to create an accumulator loop. The provided track layout gives them a starting straight line, but they must build the North return loop themselves using N, W, and S tiles.
